Off Calendar Jun-30-2003 Continued To Aug-14-03 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Gordon D. Brown, Esq., for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 8. (Administrative fee) is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or a response to the Order to Show Cause filed, court ordered Gordon D. Brown, Esq., is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 8/14/2003 at 10:30 am, in Department 212.Proceedings reported by: Norma Reay. (212)
